title: Run Samwise daily closeout
goal: End each workday with clear continuity notes, self-improvement signals, and next-step readiness.

steps.text: Review today's completed changes, validation checks, and remaining open tasks.
Summarize outcomes, key learnings, and effectiveness gaps in plain language.
Write one new JSONL entry in Docs/Plan/logs/samwise-diary.jsonl using the schema contract.
If pack/session behavior changed, update partner and gardening records for traceability.
Define next-day goals and the first concrete action to resume quickly.
If commit-ready changes exist, record commit authorization mode: per-commit AJ approval by default, or explicit AJ-approved auto-commit for the active non-main worktree.

acceptanceCriteria: A new samwise diary entry exists for the day
Learning and improvement items are concrete and actionable
Next-day goals are explicit and restart-ready
Related logs are updated when pack/session context changed
Commit authorization mode is explicit when commit-ready changes are present

verification.text: Confirm new JSONL diary entry matches schema-required fields
Confirm summary, learnings, and next goals are present and specific
Confirm related logs were updated when context changed
Confirm commit authorization mode is recorded when commit-ready changes were identified
